content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA
Court of Appeal
FIRST APPELLATE DISTRICT
DIVISION TWO
MARATHON PLAZA - SOUTH TOWER
303 SECOND STREET, SUITE 600
SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107

J. CLINTON PETERSON
ASSOCIATE JUSTICE

September 29, 1992

Ms. Linda Maureaux
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
California Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Statement of Economic Interests--Assuming Office Statement

Dear Ms. Maureaux:

As I have discussed with you, I was elevated to the position of Presiding Justice of Division Five of the First District Court of Appeal by appointment of Governor Wilson, effective September 25, 1992. Prior to that, I was an Associate Justice of Division Two of the same court.

The purpose of this letter is to confirm your advice that, under these circumstances, it is not necessary for me to file a statement of economic interests, under the provisions of Government Code sections 87205 and 87200, on assuming office.

Thanking you for your courtesies, I am

Very truly yours,

[signature]
J. CLINTON PETERSON
Presiding Justice
Division Five
